Frequently Asked Questions

  • A refrigerator with a counter-depth design provides a seamless, flush appearance that enhances your kitchen's modern look. It is a great option for smaller kitchens or spaces with limited room, as its shallow build helps make the space feel larger while still offering functional storage. For more details on available configurations, explore options like French door refrigerators and side-by-side models.

  • Counter-depth refrigerators typically offer slightly less storage in cubic feet compared to standard models. However, they feature smart interior organization options, such as adjustable shelves, removable bins, and door storage, making it easy to maximize every inch while keeping items organized and accessible.

  • Yes, many counter-depth refrigerators include smart features like app control, voice activation, Wi-Fi connectivity, and options for internal or external water dispensers. These features increase kitchen convenience and enhance your overall experience.

  • You can find counter-depth refrigerators in multiple configurations, including popular styles like French door refrigerators and side-by-side models, allowing you to choose according to your kitchen layout and storage needs.

  • To find the perfect fit for your kitchen, it's important to review sizing guidelines and compare different models. You can read our refrigerator buying guide for expert tips on sizing and choosing the best options for your space. If you need personalized advice, please contact our team for friendly assistance.

Counter-Depth Refrigerators for a Seamless Look

When getting ready to upgrade your refrigerator, there is a wide selection of options to pick from; ranging from appliances to brands to unique features. With all of these to keep in mind, it can be difficult to make a decision. A counter-depth refrigerator is a great choice if you want to have a flush appearance in your kitchen which can mean a cleaner look. This style of appliance could be the way to go even if a flush look isn’t your top priority. If you have a smaller kitchen or limited space, this option can not only make your space feel larger but it can grant more room to move around and cook. Regardless of the size of your kitchen, this appliance will fit right in and can elevate the look of your home.

A Clean, Functional Look

Just because these appliances are flush with the rest of your kitchen, doesn’t mean you have to sacrifice your preferred style. Whether you want French door refrigerators or a side-by-side model, counter-depth fridges are available in multiple configurations. However, when you purchase a counter-depth refrigerator it’s important to remember that they offer slightly less storage in cubic feet; however, you don’t need to worry about sacrificing functionality. On the interior of these fridges, there are several options to help save space and make it easier to store items. Ranging from adjustable shelves to removable bins, you can customize the space to keep all of your produce, left-overs and sauces organized and cool. There can be storage located on the inside of the doors as well to save space for larger items. Whether you are planning on doing a whole kitchen remodel or simply need a new appliance, a counter-depth refrigerator could be an ideal fit.

Smart Features Means an Elevated Experience

Depending on the style of counter-depth refrigerator you decide to go with, there are a variety of smart features to help enhance your kitchen further and provide more functionality. Some features allow you to control your fridge from an app on your mobile device. This can be done using either your voice or touch controls. You can even see what you have while shopping at the store so you won’t forget an important ingredient for a meal. Other options come with Wi-Fi so you connect it to your network and regulate the appliance easily. Additionally, many come with water dispensers but you can decide if you would prefer an external or internal one. Each of these features help to make your kitchen more convenient for you and your family.

Regardless of the style you are looking for, a counter-depth refrigerator can help create an elegant, modern look for your kitchen. Abt offers a variety of models from trusted brands like Whirlpool, GE, Samsung and more. If you aren’t sure if a counter-depth refrigerator is a good choice for your kitchen, reach out to our experts at 800-860-3577 for additional assistance. If you want to complete your own research, check out our refrigerator buying guide to learn about more available options.
